positive: A vibrant and stylized geometric jungle scene featuring abstract tropical leaves (monstera, palm, fern) interwoven with clean, modern geometric lines and bioluminescent glowing elements. The composition should be symmetrical and highly detailed, emphasizing strong silhouettes against a deep indigo and emerald green background. Include stylized, stylized glowing fireflies and orchid motifs. Flat vector illustration style with a slight retro vaporwave aesthetic, high contrast, centralized composition, perfect for screen printing on apparel.
